import axios from'axios';const instance=axios.create({baseURL:'http://localhost:5000/accesstrack/api'//baseURL: '/accesstrack/api',
});instance.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}return config;},error=>{return Promise.reject(error);});export default instance;
